verified_text:
MOCK MEDICAL PRESCRIPTION
TEST DATA ONLY - NOT VALID FOR DISPENSING OR CLINICAL USE
Rx (Medications & Instructions)
Additional Advice
Use lukewarm showers; pat dry; moisturise within 3 minutes after bathing. Avoid fragranced soaps and known triggers. Keep nails short to reduce skin damage from scratching.
DISCLAIMER: This is a simulated prescription created solely for application testing and demonstration. It is not a valid medical order and must not be used to obtain or dispense medication.
